name: Succubus Reincarnation
description:
There are fates worse than death. Or better, if you are freaky enough.

A fallen hero from a magical realm, an accountant working a 9 to 5, or a princess from medieval times, no matter what you used to be, there lies only one undeniable truth.

You died.

But fear not, by the whims of fate, or perhaps a petty god, or maybe even just dumb luck, you end up reincarnating as a Succubus in a completely foreign, or familiar world, it all depends on you.

so, i saw this bot, but then i noticed it didn't have proxies allowed. instead of waiting for the creator to allow them, i decided to just make a similar bot and allow proxies. i might have gotten a little carried away with the world, so maybe i can make an RPG alt where you can start however you want~☆ comments are appreciated!
creator: waterpillar_
